  122 | /**
  123 |  * Step Group: SG: Get Status from Queue data
  124 |  * ID: 199
  125 |  * Steps: 20
  126 |  */
  127 | export async function stepGroup_SG_Get_Status_from_Queue_data(page: import('@playwright/test').Page, vars: Record<string, string>) {
  128 |   const extPage = new ExtPage(page);
  129 |   const lenderPricePage = new LenderPricePage(page);
  130 |   await extPage.And_Extra_Menu_Dropdown_Dropdown_Toggle.click();
  131 |   await extPage.XPath_4A4A2A.click();
  132 |   await lenderPricePage.Refresh_Button_in_Queue.click();
  133 |   await extPage.Span_Loan_Input_Filter_Input.fill(vars["LOAN ID"]);
  134 |   await extPage.Select_Filter_Select.selectOption({ label: "Error" });
  135 | 
  136 |   if (true) /* Element Details Button is visible */ {
  137 |     await extPage.Loan_Detailsshow(vars["LOAN ID"]).click();
  138 |     if (true) /* Element Error Message Object is visible */ {
  139 |       await extPage.Span_Errormessage.scrollIntoViewIfNeeded();
  140 |     }
  141 |     await extPage.H5_Job_Modal_Header_Modal_Footer.click();
  142 |   }
  143 |   await page.screenshot({ fullPage: true });
  144 |   if (true) /* Element Queue Error Status is visible */ {
  145 |     await lenderPricePage.Show_error_Button.click();
  146 |     vars["Error Details"] = await lenderPricePage.Error_Details_on_Error_Message.textContent() || '';
  147 |     page.once('dialog', dialog => {
  148 |       expect(dialog.message()).toContain("Error Message");
  149 |       dialog.accept();
  150 |     });
  151 |     await page.screenshot({ fullPage: true });
  152 |     await extPage.Error_On_This_Modal_Footer.click();
  153 |   }
  154 | }
